channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine trains elite drone pilots as electronic warfare intensifies
item.description: Ukrainian military pilots demonstrated interceptor drone skills in western Ukraine, training to counter Russian drone threats as electronic warfare becomes increasingly critical to the conflict.

item.title: 🦠 Uganda confirms three new Ebola cases as outbreak spreads
item.description: Uganda reported three new Ebola cases on Saturday, bringing the total confirmed cases to five. The WHO has warned against underestimating the risk of regional spread from the DRC-Uganda outbreak.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey detains 13 in probe of opposition congress that chose ousted leader
item.description: Turkish police detained 13 people in an investigation into a 2023 opposition CHP congress that elected the mayor of Istanbul, as political tensions continue in Turkey.

item.title: ⚔️ Death toll in Luhansk student dorm strike rises to 10
item.description: A Russian-installed official said the death toll from a drone strike on a student dormitory in the Russian-controlled Luhansk region of eastern Ukraine has risen to 10.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇦 Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of deadly dormitory attack
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin promised revenge after accusing Ukraine of carrying out a deadly attack on a student dormitory in Russian-controlled Luhansk that he says killed six people. Ukraine dismissed the claim, stating the attack was exclusively targeted at military infrastructure.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇹🇼 US pauses $14bn arms sale to Taiwan amid China pressure
item.description: The United States has paused a major arms sale package to Taiwan worth $14 billion, according to reports. Taiwan's Premier Cho Jung-tai said the island would continue pursuing arms purchases despite the delay, which comes amid heightened US-China tensions and the ongoing Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇸🇳 Senegal President sacks PM Sonko, dissolves government
item.description: President Bassirou Diomaye Faye dismissed Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko and dissolved the government after months of tensions, deepening political uncertainty in the West African nation.

item.title: 🌍 International contact group urges warring parties in DR Congo to facilitate Ebola response
item.description: An international contact group called on warring parties in eastern DR Congo to allow humanitarian access for Ebola response efforts as the outbreak spreads.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel strikes Iranian air defense systems near nuclear sites
item.description: Israel struck Iranian air defense systems near key nuclear and military sites, continuing the ongoing military confrontation between the two nations.

item.title: 🇧🇴 Police clash with protesters in new marches against Bolivian leader
item.description: Police and protesters clashed during renewed demonstrations against Bolivia's president, as political unrest continues in the South American nation.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇹🇼 US arms sales to Taiwan unrelated to Iran war, source says
item.description: U.S. arms sales to Taiwan take years to process and are unrelated to the war with Iran, a source familiar with the matter said, after a senior U.S. official suggested there was a pause due to the need to have enough arms for the conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇺🇸 Rubio's India trip signals US need to repair ties
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrived in India on a mission to shore up a partnership battered by President Donald Trump's tariffs and Washington's renewed engagement with New Delhi's rivals Pakistan and China.

item.title: 🇨🇭 Switzerland widens sanctions against Russia, Belarus
item.description: Switzerland expanded its sanctions lists against Russia and Belarus, adopting parts of the European Union's latest package of measures over Moscow's war in Ukraine.

item.title: 🛢️ UAE considered leaving OPEC over three years, presidential adviser says
item.description: A UAE presidential adviser revealed the country considered leaving OPEC for over three years, highlighting internal tensions within the oil cartel.

item.title: 🏛️ Trump officials tried to ban half of US voting machines, citing conspiracy theories
item.description: A White House adviser tasked with proving election-rigging conspiracy theories attempted to ban half of US voting machines, Reuters reports.

item.title: ⚔️ Three months in, is Trump losing the Iran war?
item.description: With Iran's grip on the Strait of Hormuz, its resistance to nuclear concessions and its theocratic government largely intact, doubts are growing about the U.S. military's ability to achieve its objectives in the conflict.

item.title: 💰 Shein to buy apparel retailer Everlane
item.description: Chinese fast-fashion giant Shein announced plans to acquire US apparel retailer Everlane, marking a significant expansion into the American retail market.

item.title: 🛢️ Indonesia works to iron out ambitious Russian oil import plan
item.description: Indonesia is working through the details of an ambitious plan to import Russian oil, navigating sanctions and logistics challenges.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine attacked Russian oil refinery in Yaroslavl, Zelenskiy says
item.description: Ukrainian forces struck a Russian oil refinery in Yaroslavl, President Zelenskiy confirmed, as Ukraine continues its campaign against Russian energy infrastructure.

item.title: 🇨🇳 90 dead in China's worst coal mine disaster in over 16 years
item.description: The death toll from a gas explosion at a coal mine in Shanxi province jumped to 90, making it China's worst mining disaster in over 16 years.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump forces foreigners seeking US green cards to go home first
item.description: New Trump administration policy requires foreigners applying for US green cards to leave the country first, significantly impacting immigration processes.

item.title: 🇦🇪 Israel thrusts reluctant UAE into open over defence ties
item.description: Israel is pushing the UAE to publicly acknowledge defence cooperation, creating tension in the Gulf state's carefully balanced regional relationships.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Trump's blunt warning collides with historic call offer to Taiwan
item.description: Former President Trump's stark warnings about Taiwan's defense spending clash with reports of a potential historic presidential call offer to the island.

item.title: 🇸🇮 Slovenia's parliament approves right-wing Janez Jansa as prime minister
item.description: Slovenia's parliament approved right-wing veteran Janez Jansa as prime minister, returning the conservative leader to power amid political fragmentation.
